note: Frozen live state; superseded items deliberately absent. Authored before the harness.

active_claims.what: enterprise customers prefer usage-based pricing with a cap, not per-seat pricing

active_constraints.what: the entry price must stay below Competitor X's 79 dollars per month

decisions.what: use usage-based pricing for the add-on; the flat 99-per-month plan was dropped

open_conflicts.what: sales wants an annual-commitment discount vs finance wants month-to-month for revenue recognition

open_questions.what: whether to offer a free tier
